steps.title: Complete the relative clause
steps.content: The clause introduced by whose needs a subject and finite verb: body of work is interdisciplinary. The adjective interdisciplinary cannot stand alone as the predicate without a verb.

steps.title: Use a finite verb
steps.content: A uses a participial phrase, C uses an infinitive, and D uses a participle; each leaves the whose-clause without a proper finite predicate. The form with is completes the clause grammatically. The answer is B.
